Provenance.description:
Tracks how artifact content was produced and its review state.

This is central to APLH's knowledge governance: every piece of content
must declare its origin and confidence level so that reviewers can
assess trustworthiness.

source_refs.description: List of source document references (document IDs, URLs, etc.)
source_refs.title: Source Refs

method.description: Description of the production method (e.g., 'extracted by Gemini 3.1 Pro from CCAR-33 §33.28')
method.title: Method

reviewed_by.description: Reviewer identity (empty if not yet reviewed)
reviewed_by.title: Reviewed By

review_date.description: ISO date of review (empty if not yet reviewed)
review_date.title: Review Date

Provenance.title: Provenance

ProvenanceSourceType.description: How the artifact content was produced.
ProvenanceSourceType.title: ProvenanceSourceType

description: Functional decomposition entry for propulsion control logic.

purpose.description: What this function accomplishes in the control system
purpose.title: Purpose

inputs.description: Input signals, parameters, or data consumed by this function
inputs.title: Inputs

outputs.description: Output signals, commands, or data produced by this function
outputs.title: Outputs

preconditions.description: Conditions that must be true before this function executes
preconditions.title: Preconditions

postconditions.description: Conditions guaranteed after successful function execution
postconditions.title: Postconditions

dependent_requirements.description: REQ-xxxx IDs that this function implements or satisfies
dependent_requirements.title: Dependent Requirements

related_interfaces.description: IFACE-xxxx IDs of interfaces this function uses or provides
related_interfaces.title: Related Interfaces

abnormal_considerations.description: ABN-xxxx IDs of abnormal conditions this function must handle
abnormal_considerations.title: Abnormal Considerations

owner_domain.description: Engineering domain that owns this function (e.g., 'fuel_control', 'thrust_management')
owner_domain.title: Owner Domain

related_modes.description: MODE-xxxx IDs of modes this function is active in
related_modes.title: Related Modes

related_transitions.description: TRANS-xxxx IDs of transitions that invoke this function as an action
related_transitions.title: Related Transitions

title: Function
